market_context: In a strong downtrend (Nifty -0.9%, ADX 25), supply zone SELL setups are heavily favored as they align with the prevailing trend. SELL setups on HINDUNILVR, SBIN, RELIANCE, INFY, TCS, ICICIBANK, and ITC offer the highest probability. BUY setups are counter-trend and carry elevated risk, so only the strongest demand zones with exceptional leg-out candles are considered.
